notes: Settle into consistent doubles. One true brick. Extend long ride and long run by time, not speed.
Keep one key bike session only. Everything else aerobic.

Mon.details: Easy aerobic swim. Relaxed and continuous.

Wed.details: Easy continuous or short aerobic reps.
Easy to steady. Build slightly in the second half.

Thu.details: 8×5m medium effort, 2–3m easy between. Controlled, not hard.

notes: Keep frequency high. Extend long ride and long run slightly.
Stay controlled. No second hard session.
Reduce slightly into the April 23–25 home simulation.
Treat simulation as a long training day, not a race.

Fri.details: Rest or very easy 20–30m spin only if needed.

Sat.details: Home 70.3 simulation day: steady bike, controlled run.

notes: Absorb the simulation. Resume normal rhythm without forcing volume.
